message:
Improve Gemini protocol detection for minimal hook payloads

Extend detect_protocol() to recognize Gemini CLI hooks that only
provide the beforeTool event marker and run_shell_command tool name,
without the full session-level envelope fields (session_id,
transcript_path, etc.). Some Gemini integrations send minimal
payloads with only hook_event_name + tool_name.

- Add has_gemini_before_tool_marker check combining BeforeTool event
  name with run_shell_command/run-shell-command tool names
- Protocol detection now fires on either session envelope fields OR
  the beforeTool+shell_command marker
- Add test verifying Gemini detection without session fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
